start.speaker: Charity
start.text: You have a family, have you not? Why did you not bring them with you on this way?
start.text_zh: 你是有家室的，不是吗？你为何没有带他们同走这路？

choices.text: I begged them to come. They would not — yet I pray for them still.
choices.text_zh: 我曾恳求他们同来。他们不肯——但我至今仍为他们祷告。

choices.text: It grieves me daily that they stayed behind.
choices.text_zh: 他们留在后面，这事天天叫我痛心。

comfort.speaker: Charity
comfort.text: You have done what love could do — gone before them and held them up in prayer. Carry no false guilt down the valley; carry love, and keep praying.
comfort.text_zh: 你已做了爱所能做的——先他们而行，又在祷告中托住他们。不要把虚假的愧疚带下幽谷；要带着爱，并不住祷告。

choices.text: Thank you, Charity. I will keep praying for them.
choices.text_zh: 谢谢你，仁爱。我必为他们不住祷告。
